'''sabongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyujitai|kyujitai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyujitai|kyujitai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sabongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbengeth|sæbengeth]] || [[word:sæbengej|sæbengej]] || [[word:sæbengesh|sæbengesh]] || [[word:sæbenge|sæbenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabobongoth|sabobongoth]] || [[word:sabobongoj|sabobongoj]] || [[word:sabobongosh|sabobongosh]] || [[word:sabobongo|sabobongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabongoth|sabongoth]] || [[word:sabongoj|sabongoj]] || [[word:sabongosh|sabongosh]] || [[word:sabongo|sabongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabofngoth|sabofngoth]] || [[word:sabofngoj|sabofngoj]] || [[word:sabofngosh|sabofngosh]] || [[word:sabofngof|sabofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabongotho|sabongotho]] || [[word:sabongojo|sabongojo]] || [[word:sabongosho|sabongosho]] || [[word:sabongoko|sabongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabongoth|sabongoth]] || [[word:sabongoj|sabongoj]] || [[word:sabongosh|sabongosh]] || [[word:sabongo|sabongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabongothol|sabongothol]] || [[word:sabongojol|sabongojol]] || [[word:sabongoshol|sabongoshol]] || [[word:sabongokol|sabongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabongothotho|sabongothotho]] || [[word:sabongojojo|sabongojojo]] || [[word:sabongoshosho|sabongoshosho]] || [[word:sabongoko|sabongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabongothon|sabongothon]] || [[word:sabongojon|sabongojon]] || [[word:sabongoshon|sabongoshon]] || [[word:sabongokon|sabongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabongothoro|sabongothoro]] || [[word:sabongojoro|sabongojoro]] || [[word:sabongoshoro|sabongoshoro]] || [[word:sabongokoro|sabongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
